'''鈭歱-p-ch-d''' ('''kapapchedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hode|hode]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-p-ch-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hode|hode]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-p-ch-d
|-
! Lemma
| kapapchedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipapchedoko|thipapchedoko]] || [[word:jipapchedoko|jipapchedoko]] || [[word:shipapchedoko|shipapchedoko]] || [[word:kipapchedoko|kipapchedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupapchedoko|thuthupapchedoko]] || [[word:jujupapchedoko|jujupapchedoko]] || [[word:shushupapchedoko|shushupapchedoko]] || [[word:kukupapchedoko|kukupapchedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupapchedoko|thupapchedoko]] || [[word:jupapchedoko|jupapchedoko]] || [[word:shupapchedoko|shupapchedoko]] || [[word:kupapchedoko|kupapchedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupapchedoko|thupapchedoko]] || [[word:jupapchedoko|jupapchedoko]] || [[word:shupapchedoko|shupapchedoko]] || [[word:kupapchedoko|kupapchedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepapchedoko|thepapchedoko]] || [[word:jepapchedoko|jepapchedoko]] || [[word:shepapchedoko|shepapchedoko]] || [[word:kepapchedoko|kepapchedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopapchedoko|thothopapchedoko]] || [[word:jojopapchedoko|jojopapchedoko]] || [[word:shoshopapchedoko|shoshopapchedoko]] || [[word:kokopapchedoko|kokopapchedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopapchedoko|thopapchedoko]] || [[word:jopapchedoko|jopapchedoko]] || [[word:shopapchedoko|shopapchedoko]] || [[word:kopapchedoko|kopapchedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopapchedoko|thopapchedoko]] || [[word:jopapchedoko|jopapchedoko]] || [[word:shopapchedoko|shopapchedoko]] || [[word:kopapchedoko|kopapchedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙papchedoko|th忙papchedoko]] || [[word:j忙papchedoko|j忙papchedoko]] || [[word:sh忙papchedoko|sh忙papchedoko]] || [[word:k忙papchedoko|k忙papchedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapapchedoko|thathapapchedoko]] || [[word:jajapapchedoko|jajapapchedoko]] || [[word:shashapapchedoko|shashapapchedoko]] || [[word:kakapapchedoko|kakapapchedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapapchedoko|thapapchedoko]] || [[word:japapchedoko|japapchedoko]] || [[word:shapapchedoko|shapapchedoko]] || [[word:kapapchedoko|kapapchedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapapchedoko|thapapchedoko]] || [[word:japapchedoko|japapchedoko]] || [[word:shapapchedoko|shapapchedoko]] || [[word:kapapchedoko|kapapchedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
